---
id: close-identity
title: "Initiate closure of an identity's virtual account."
description: "Transitions the account ACTIVE or LIMITED -> CLOSING. The account stops accepting new attributed inflow immediately; any settlement already in flight is allowed to clear. Once balance reaches zero and funds are swept to sweep_destination, the account transitions CLOSING -> CLOSED automatically and an `identity.closed` webhook fires. This endpoint does not block until closure completes; it starts the process."
sidebar_label: "Initiate closure of an identity's virtual account."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/kobo-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Initiate closure of an identity's virtual account."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/identities/{identityId}/close"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Transitions the account ACTIVE or LIMITED -&gt; CLOSING. The account stops accepting new attributed inflow immediately; any settlement already in flight is allowed to clear. Once balance reaches zero and funds are swept to sweep_destination, the account transitions CLOSING -&gt; CLOSED automatically and an `identity.closed` webhook fires. This endpoint does not block until closure completes; it starts the process.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
